'''Bot''' was a enigmatic and mute hooded henchman of [[Captain-Supervisor]] [[Grammel]] on [[Mimban/Legends|Circarpous V]]. As he could not speak, he nodded when speaking with Grammel.

{{Char-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Splinter of the Mind's Eye]]'' {{1st}}
*[[Splinter of the Mind's Eye 2|''Splinter of the Mind's Eye'' 2]] {{1stp}}
